title: Quick Blatjang
excerpt: Quick Blatjang 1 onion 20 ml finely chopped ginger 10 ml oil 5ml curry powder 2 cloves garlic 5 ml mustard powder 2 chopped chillies/peppadews 2.5 ml ground ginger 125 ml brown vinegar 2.5 ml mixed herbs 750 ml apricot jam 5 ml salt Method finely chop the onion, ginger, garlic and chillies in a food processor …
html:
Quick Blatjang

1 onion

20 ml finely chopped ginger

10 ml oil
5ml curry powder
2 cloves garlic
5 ml mustard powder
2 chopped chillies/peppadews
2,5 ml ground ginger
125 ml brown vinegar
2,5 ml mixed herbs
750 ml apricot jam
5 ml salt

Method

  1. finely chop the onion, ginger, garlic and chillies in a food processor
  2. fry in oil until glassy
  3. add the vinegar and cook for 5 minutes
  4. add the rest of the ingredients and cook for 30 min
